_instructions: Add your API keys here to enable AI features
_get_huggingface_key: FREE: Get your key at https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens
_get_openai_key: PAID: Get your key at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
_get_anthropic_key: PAID: Get your key at https://console.anthropic.com/
_get_together_key: PAID: Get your key at https://api.together.xyz/
_get_replicate_key: PAID: Get your key at https://replicate.com/account/api-tokens
_note: Never commit this file with real API keys. Use cloud_ai_config.example.json as a template.
